human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-900 is descriptor-only production-ready; HRX runtime opening, document storage runtime, contract execution/signature runtime, payroll calculation, HR AI final judgment, separate HRX product claims, enterprise trust, production deployment, and final human approval remain deferred to CP00-901/RP30.P01.M03.S03 or later human-approved packs.
